categories.name: Historical
categories.description: Styles rooted in recognizable historic visual movements and ornament systems.

categories.name: Modernist Functional
categories.description: Styles that prioritize clarity, system logic, utility, and direct structure.

categories.name: Digital Futuristic
categories.description: Styles built around digital surfaces, light, depth, glow, and synthetic atmosphere.

categories.name: Minimal Natural
categories.description: Styles that use restraint, calm rhythm, natural warmth, and quiet material cues.

categories.name: Playful Expressive
categories.description: Styles with high personality, novelty, decorative energy, or intentional visual surprise.

categories.name: Editorial Luxury
categories.description: Styles that rely on refined typography, restraint, premium spacing, and elevated presentation.

categories.name: Surface Treatment
categories.description: Styles primarily defined by depth, material, blur, lighting, edge treatment, or panel behavior.

categories.name: Layout System
categories.description: Styles primarily defined by arrangement, modularity, grouping, and repeated spatial logic.

categories.name: Mixed
categories.description: Hybrid or transitional styles that intentionally combine multiple visual systems.
